name: Local 697
description_short: Local 697 FCU is a member-owned federal credit union in Merrillville, Indiana, offering auto loans, mortgages, student loans, and credit cards with upcoming credit bureau reporting starting May 2026.
description_long:
Local 697 Federal Credit Union operates as a not-for-profit, member-owned financial institution serving the Merrillville, Indiana area. The credit union provides comprehensive financial services to members, including deposit accounts, various loan products, and insurance options. As a federally chartered credit union, it is insured by the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA), offering members the security and consumer protections associated with the federal credit union system.

Local 697 FCU offers a broad range of lending products including auto loans (with vehicle search functionality across autos, motorcycles, RVs, golf carts, marine, and powersports), mortgage loans, student loans, and credit cards. Members also have access to online banking, online loan applications, bill pay services, and an extensive ATM network through the CO-OP ATM Network. The credit union provides additional financial protection through Debt Protection with Life Plus insurance, which covers involuntary unemployment, disability, death, accidental dismemberment, terminal illness, hospitalization, and family medical leave. Members also benefit from exclusive partnerships like Love My Credit Union Rewards for tax preparation discounts.

A significant distinguishing feature is Local 697 FCU's decision to begin reporting member loan and credit account activity to major credit bureaus effective May 1, 2026. This change enables members to build credit history through on-time payments, a feature that previously may not have been available. The credit union also offers online loan applications for streamlined access and maintains physical operations in Merrillville with regular business hours (Monday-Friday, 9am-5pm) and accessible phone support.

Local 697 FCU is best suited for individuals in the Merrillville, Indiana area seeking traditional credit union banking with competitive loan products and credit-building opportunities. The membership model emphasizes member benefits and reinvestment of profits, though specific rates and terms are not detailed on the website. The primary consideration for prospective members is geographic location, as this appears to be a community-focused institution.
services: Auto loans with vehicle search across multiple categories (autos, motorcycles, RVs, golf carts, marine, powersports)
Mortgage loans for home purchase and refinancing
Debt Protection with Life Plus insurance
Share accounts and share certificates (typical credit union deposit products)
pros: Credit bureau reporting beginning May 1, 2026 allows members to build credit history through on-time loan and credit account payments
Comprehensive loan offerings including auto loans, mortgages, student loans, and credit cards through a single institution
Online loan application system for convenient application process without visiting branch
Access to CO-OP ATM Network for nationwide ATM access beyond local branches
Debt Protection with Life Plus insurance covering multiple hardship scenarios including unemployment, disability, and hospitalization
Love My Credit Union Rewards program providing exclusive member discounts including tax preparation services
Member-owned not-for-profit structure means profits are reinvested for member benefit rather than shareholder returns
cons: Limited geographic service area—appears to serve primarily Merrillville, Indiana region, restricting membership eligibility
Website does not display current interest rates, APRs, or specific loan terms, requiring direct contact for pricing information
No mention of mobile app availability, limiting digital-only banking convenience compared to larger institutions
Credit bureau reporting only begins May 1, 2026—current members have not yet benefited from credit-building features
Limited information about account types and minimum balance requirements on public-facing website
best_for: Merrillville, Indiana residents seeking credit union membership with competitive loan products and member-focused benefits
Individuals looking to build credit history through on-time loan and credit account payments starting May 2026
Auto buyers needing financing with vehicle search and online application convenience
Members wanting comprehensive financial services (loans, cards, insurance) from a single not-for-profit institution
diagnosis: Local 697 FCU is best for individuals in the Merrillville, Indiana area seeking traditional credit union banking with competitive loan products and the opportunity to build credit history starting May 2026. The primary caveat is geographic limitation—membership appears restricted to specific service areas, and the credit union does not display rates or terms online, requiring direct contact for pricing comparison.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
